lsp session.jsonl
stdout '"name":"specmd-lsp"'
stdout '"method":"textDocument/publishDiagnostics"'
stdout 'missing ## Story section'
stdout 'missing ## Questions section'

-- session.jsonl --
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"textDocument/didOpen","params":{"textDocument":{"uri":"file:///repo/openspec/extensions/example-mapping/auth.md","languageId":"markdown","version":1,"text":"# Login example mapping\n\n## Rules\n\n## Examples\n"}}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"shutdown"}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"exit"}
